are_you_ok.title: Weather Impact Alert: Heat advisory issued for Front Range and plains
are_you_ok.summary: Heat advisory for Front Range/plains — broad local population, safety impact.

conversation_starters.title: Denver to open cooling centers as intense heat continues
conversation_starters.summary: Cooling centers opening is mitigation/benefit tied to heat — positive framing, so conversation starter not check-in. You could open with: 'Denver's opening cooling centers with this heat — have you been staying cool?'

conversation_starters.title: Green Ridge Fire south of Steamboat Springs, Colorado reaches 100% containment
conversation_starters.summary: Local Colorado wildfire reaching 100% containment — positive resolution, work-safe. You could open with: 'Good news that the Green Ridge Fire near Steamboat is fully contained now — were you following that at all?'

you_should_know.title: Employee of Aurora ICE Processing Center arrested, accused of shooting Colorado protester
you_should_know.summary: Aurora ICE facility employee accused of shooting a protester — partisan, politically charged ICE-enforcement story landing locally. Unsafe opener; walk in aware.
